title: Ludo.ai Game Asset
description: Schema representing game assets generated by the Ludo.ai platform, including images, spritesheets, 3D models, videos, and audio files.

asset_type.description: The category of generated game asset.

url.description: URL of the generated asset. Temporary and expires after 7 days.

request_id.description: Client-provided identifier for tracking and retrieving the asset asynchronously.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the asset was generated.

credits_consumed.description: Number of credits consumed to generate this asset.

ImageDetails.description: Details specific to generated image assets.

image_type.description: The type of game image asset.

art_style.description: The art style used for generation.

perspective.description: The camera perspective used for the image.

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the generated image.

prompt.description: The text prompt used to generate the image.

SpritesheetDetails.description: Details specific to generated spritesheet animation assets.

video_url.description: URL of the animation as a video file.

gif_url.description: URL of the animated GIF version.

num_frames.description: Total number of frames in the spritesheet.

num_cols.description: Number of columns in the spritesheet grid.

num_rows.description: Number of rows in the spritesheet grid.

frame_size.description: Size of each frame in pixels.

loop.description: Whether the animation is a seamless loop.

motion_prompt.description: The motion prompt used to generate the animation.

Model3DDetails.description: Details specific to generated 3D model assets.

model_url.description: URL of the GLB 3D model file.

snapshots.description: Snapshot images of the 3D model from four different angles.

texture_type.description: Type of texture applied to the model.

target_num_faces.description: Target triangle count for the mesh.

VideoDetails.description: Details specific to generated video assets.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds.

prompt.description: The motion prompt used to generate the video.

AudioDetails.description: Details specific to generated audio assets.

audio_type.description: The type of audio asset generated.

description.description: The text description or prompt used to generate the audio.

duration.description: Duration of the audio in seconds.

voice_preset_id.description: The voice preset character used for speech generation.

emotion.description: The emotion applied to speech delivery.
